title: Garden Tools Set, 9 Pieces Gardening Hand Tool Gift Kit, Stainless Steel Gardening Gifts for Women & Men with Heavy Duty Tool Bag for Easy Storage
features: 【9 Pieces Garden Tools Set】：Fixmend garden gifts set includes 8 multifunctional tools and 1 storage bag.It can almost solve all the problems you encounter in daily garden maintenance.
【Premium Stainless Steel】The garden hand tools are made of stainless steel, which are shiny, rust-proof, and nondeformable, easy to clean, with high hardness and durability.

【Ergonomic Handle Design】:The anti slip wooden handle adopts ergonomic design, which can achieve a more comfortable and relaxed user experience, suitable for hands of different sizes. Reduce hand pain and fatigue while digging, weeding, planting and pruning. Great for seniors.

【Portable Storage Bag】For easy storage, the gardening tools set comes with a heavy storage bag with a vintage floral design, adding extra beauty to your garden. There are 9 slots for storing all tools to ensure you don't lose any tools and it is easy to carry. In addition, each tool handle has a dedicated hole for hanging during off-season or after use.

【Best Gift for Gardening Lovers】：The tote bag is design with a floral vintage styles, easy to carry, which is the best Mother's Day gift for mum, an excellent gift for neighbors and enthusiastic gardening lovers.
